signals.npcLine: Crypto flux unstable; trust fades fast in neon grids.
signals.questPulse: Market drops; shadow brokers tighten data locks.
signals.worldFeed: Global digital tokens bleed value under shadowed skies.
signals.clueEvent: Silent exchanges flicker with anxious algorithmic whispers.

signals.npcLine: Holo traders report spike in underground token chatter.
signals.questPulse: Unseen spikes in CHIP and RAVE stir covert ops.
signals.worldFeed: Encrypted channels buzz; forbidden coins on rogue watchlists.
signals.clueEvent: Data scramblers detect rise in CHIP and RAVE signals.

signals.npcLine: SPK waves pulse stronger — silent streets hum unrest.
signals.questPulse: Rogue packets hint at OCT and PENGU disrupting nets.
signals.worldFeed: Token flickers in the net hint at hidden agendas.
signals.clueEvent: Pattern shifts around SPK and OCT tokens signal unrest.

signals.npcLine: Fear rides high; intel handlers seek data stabilizers now.
signals.questPulse: Urgent: Calm cyberstorm, patch leaking digital assets fast.
signals.worldFeed: Darkweb brokers scramble to contain spreading market dread.
signals.clueEvent: Data breach traces link to sudden market unravel.
